theme_and_archetype.description: A cinematic, ultra-premium AI SaaS platform. Uses deep obsidian black (#050505) as the base, elevated by glassmorphism and subtle neon edge-lighting in Electric Blue, Purple, and Pink. It feels like a high-end command center for film industry executives mixed with cutting-edge AI labs.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-12 standard) with Bento Grids.

surface_strategies.glassmorphism: bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] rounded-2xl
surface_strategies.tracing_beam: Animated gradient border (Framer Motion) on primary CTA cards and Prediction Results card using colors [#00E5FF, #9D4CDD, #FF007F].

motion_and_animations.scroll_animations: GSAP for scroll-triggered parallax on background elements and floating movie posters.
motion_and_animations.page_transitions: Framer motion opacity and y-axis shift (y: 20 -> 0) on route changes.
motion_and_animations.hover_effects: Cards lift (-translate-y-1) and increase border opacity. CTAs gain an outer glow.
motion_and_animations.counters: Count-up animations for Prediction Ratings and Sentiment Scores using framer-motion.

component_strategies.buttons: Shadcn Button heavily customized. Primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#00E5FF] to-[#9D4CDD] text-white rounded-full hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)] transition-all duration-300. Secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-full hover:bg-white/10.
component_strategies.inputs: Shadcn Input/Select: bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-[#00E5FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00E5FF] text-white placeholder:text-white/30 rounded-xl.
component_strategies.charts: Recharts: Dark mode grid lines (stroke-white/10). Line/Bar colors use primary neon colors. Tooltips use glassmorphism.
component_strategies.gauges: Circular SVG gauges for Rating and Sentiment. Animate stroke-dashoffset on mount.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='predict-submit-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over gradients uses text-shadow or dark overlays for readability.

pages_and_views.navbar: Glassmorphism header (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60`). Logo 'MovieAI', Links: Home, Predict, Sentiment, Analytics, About. CTA: 'Start Prediction'. data-testid='navbar-nav'.

landing_page.hero: Headline: 'PREDICT MOVIE SUCCESS BEFORE RELEASE' with gradient text effect. Subheading: 'AI-powered movie rating prediction...'. CTAs: 'Predict Rating' and 'Explore Analytics'. Parallax background with animated particles and cinematic orbs.
landing_page.features: Bento grid layout highlighting AI models, dataset scale, and sentiment tech. Use lucide-react icons with neon tints.

predict_dashboard.layout: Two-column layout. Left: Form inputs inside a glass card. Right: Real-time AI processing terminal visualization (typing effect in JetBrains Mono).
predict_dashboard.form: Fields: Movie Name, Year, Duration, Votes, Genre, Director, Actor 1/2/3. Use Shadcn selects and inputs.

prediction_results.layout: Central circular gauge for the 1-10 rating. Pulse animation and celebratory subtle effect for ratings > 8.0.
prediction_results.cards: Impact cards (Director Impact, Genre Synergy, Voting Impact) positioned around the main rating.

sentiment_analysis.layout: Large text area for review pasting. Real-time sentiment meter (Red to Green gradient) using Framer Motion layout animations.

analytics_dashboard.layout: Dense bento grid. Recharts for Rating Distribution (Bar), Genre Performance (Radar or Bar), and Year Trends (Area Chart with gradient fill). Stats cards.

about_model.layout: Timeline / Pipeline view. Show Kaggle Dataset -> Feature Engineering -> Random Forest -> TextBlob -> Final Output. Use dashed SVG connecting lines.

pages_and_views.footer: Left '© 2026 Aryan Mehta' / Center 'Movie Rating Prediction AI' / Right 'Data Sources & Credits' (opens CreditsModal).

credits_modal.content: Glassmorphic modal with links to Kaggle dataset, GitHub repo, and educational disclaimer.
